originalTitle: 1000 Players Simulate THE PURGE in Minecraft
content: purge of the cave kingdom 1000 Players Simulate THE PURGE in Minecraft Unstable SMP: ➜ ⁨@FlameFragsMC ➜ ⁨@Spokeishere ➜ ⁨@ParrotX2 ➜ ⁨@wemmbumc minor spoilers below featuring: @yungymc @JadenMAN @InfamousJJ @Dione4K music from: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) https://www.youtube.com/@Kalamity_Music (aria math remix at the end!) This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/) Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Numinos https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qWwG7EIEFHU by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Bone Hunter - Knochenjäger https://youtu.be/LchGhXSXxZk by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ Enderal Soundtrack (HQ): Prey - Beutezug https://youtu.be/TqrNKC7kybk by Marvin Kopp, licensed under CC BY 4.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ we wa we wa
chineseContent: 洞穴王国的净化 1000 名玩家在 Minecraft Unstable SMP 中模拟净化： ➜ @FlameFragsMC ➜ @Spokeishere ➜ @ParrotX2 ➜ @wemmbumc 以下有小剧透：@yungymc @JadenMAN @InknownJJ @Dione4K 音乐来自： https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg （我使用的大量音乐都是 AZALI 创作的，所以请听听他的作品！） https://www.youtube.com/@Kalamity_Music （最后有 aria 数学混音！） 这是在 Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP 中录制的 Minecraft 视频，用于讲故事；我上传的任何更多上演的视频都会在说明中包含免责声明，说明它们也是上演的。此外，Unstable SMP 视频中讨论的许多游戏机制/故障/红石对于 Unstable SMP/Unstable Universe 来说是独特的，并且两者都不会以相同的方式工作/在 vanilla Minecraft 中不存在。音乐还来自：《我的世界》官方原声带、《上古卷轴》官方原声带、官方 enderal 原声带、epidemicsound (https://www.epidemicsound.com)、storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com)、artlist (https://artlist.io)、soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com)、fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music) 和envato (https://elements.envato.com/) Enderal 原声带 (HQ)：Numinos https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=qWwG7EIEFHU，作者：Marvin Kopp，根据 CC BY 4.0 授权 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ Enderal 原声带 (HQ)：Bone Hunter - Knochenjäger https://youtu.be/LchGhXSXxZk，作者：Marvin Kopp，经 CC BY 4.0 许可 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ Enderal 原声带 (HQ)：Prey - Beutezug https://youtu.be/TqrNKC7kybk，作者：Marvin Kopp，经 CC BY 4.0 许可https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/ 我们是我们是
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
